subject: New in Growthable: your clients can now train the AI — and sign off on every reply
preheader: Portal knowledge, smarter suggested replies, snippet libraries, and reply approvals — all live now.
title: Your clients can now train the AI — and sign off on every reply
intro: Five releases that turn the client portal into the brain behind your support inbox. Your clients supply the knowledge; your team replies faster, with their sign-off built in.

sections.title: Clients can teach the AI themselves
sections.body: There’s a new Knowledge page in the client portal. Your clients paste their website, help-center links, or upload documents — the AI reads them and uses them the next time it drafts a reply to one of their customers. No more chasing clients for context over email.

sections.title: Suggested replies now know the whole story
sections.body: When your team hits Suggest reply on a ticket, the draft is written with the brand’s knowledge base, the last 100 tickets on that brand, the customer’s own open and past tickets, and recent live-chat activity already in mind. It knows what’s outstanding, what was already resolved, and what everyone’s been asking lately.

sections.title: A snippet library for every brand
sections.body: Clients keep a library of approved links and blurbs — their calendar link, contact details, policy one-liners. Your agents insert them with one click, and the AI weaves the right one into suggested replies when it clearly helps. Always verbatim, never invented.

sections.title: Words to avoid
sections.body: Each brand can list words and phrases the AI must never use — competitor names, banned claims, off-brand slang. It’s enforced when drafting, and if something slips through anyway, the composer flags it before anyone hits send.

sections.title: Nothing goes out without sign-off
sections.body: New approval workflow: your team can submit a reply for approval instead of sending it. The client sees it in their portal next to what the customer asked, and approves or rejects it with a note. Approved replies send instantly — so what reaches customers is always signed off.

outro: Everything is live now — look for NEW on Knowledge and Approvals in the portal sidebar.
